back_translation: Behold, the Father has given us love that is great, that we should be called children of God. And we are like that truly. By this reason, the world does not know us, because the world does not know Him
Beloved, now we are children of God, and it has not yet appeared what we will be in the future. But we know that when He reveals Himself, we will be like Him, because we will see Him just as He is
And everyone who has this hope in Him also purifies himself to be pure, just as He is pure
Everyone who commits sin also commits transgression-of-the-law, and sin is the transgression-of-the-law
And you all know that He has revealed Himself appearing, in order to remove sins, and there is no sin in Him at all
Everyone who abides in Him does not continue to sin. Everyone who continues to sin has not seen Him, nor known Him
Beloved children all, do not let anyone deceive you. The one who practices righteousness is also a righteous one, just as He is righteous
The one who commits sin is of the devil, because the devil has been sinning since the beginning. By this reason, the Son of God has revealed Himself, in order to destroy the works of the devil
Everyone who has been born from God does not continue to sin, because the seed of God abides in him, and he cannot continue to sin, because he has been born from God

By this thing, the children of God and the children of the devil are clearly distinguished — namely, everyone who does not practice righteousness is not from God, and the one who does not love his brother also
Because this is the message that you have heard from the beginning, namely, let us love one another
Do not be like Cain, who was of the evil one, and killed his younger brother. Why did he kill his younger brother? Because his deeds were evil, but his younger brother's deeds were righteous
Brothers all, do not be surprised if the world hates you
We know that we have passed from death to life, because we love the brothers. The one who does not love also remains in death
Everyone who hates his brother is a murderer, and you all know that a murderer does not have eternal life abiding in him
By this thing, we know love, namely that He has laid down His own life for us, and we ourselves must also lay down our lives for the brothers
But whoever has wealth in this world, and sees his brother in need, and shuts his compassionate-heart against that brother, how will the love of God abide in that one?
Beloved children all, let us not love merely with words or merely with the mouth, but love with action and with truth
And by this thing, we will know that we are of the truth, and we will make our heart confident in the presence of His face
Because if our heart accuses us, God is greater than our heart, and He knows all things
Beloved, if our heart does not accuse us, we have boldness toward God
And whatever we ask, we receive from Him, because we keep His commandments and we do what is pleasing to Him
And this is His commandment, namely, let us believe in the name of His Son, namely Jesus Christ, and let us love one another, just as He commanded us
And the one who keeps His commandments abides in Him, and He abides in that one. By this thing, we know that He abides in us, namely by the Holy Spirit whom He has given us
